form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when favourite; won by 1.0 len at Southwell All Weather January 1 over 1600m defeating Areti carrying 58kg at $2. Great chance to make it two for two.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second in a small field at Newcastle All Weather October 21 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Winged One carrying 58kg at $2.
